item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Classic Danish millionbøf – A hearty beef stew, slowlysimmered with onions, carrots, and spices until the meat is tender and fallsapart. Served with a rustic mash of potatoes and root vegetables, sprinkledwith fresh chives. Accompanied by homemade pickled organic beets with abalanced tang (10, 13, 15).

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Dal Gosht – A rich and aromatic North Indian curry with tenderlamb, yellow lentils, and seasonal vegetables, slowly simmered with ginger,garlic, and garam masala. Served with fragrant basmati or brown rice, toppedwith freshly chopped mint and parsley. Accompanied by lemon and coriander onthe side (10, 13, 15). GREEN DISH: Chickpea and lentil curry GREEN DISH: A hearty vegetarian version withchickpeas, red lentils, and vegetables, spiced with the same authentic blend.Served with basmati or brown rice, garnished with mint and parsley. Accompaniedby lemon and coriander on the side (10, 13, 15).

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Coq au vin – A classic French dish from Bourgogne with tenderwine-marinated chicken, mushrooms, and pearl onions. Served with smooth mashedpotatoes and garnished with fresh parsley. (1, 10, 15) GREEN DISH: Classic Indian dall – Rich and aromatic with red lentils, carrots, andwarm spices like cardamom and ginger. Served with fragrant basmati rice andfresh coriander and mint. (15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Juicy Danish meat patties – classic krebinetter with a crispy crust,served with soft potatoes, homemade redcurrant jelly, gently braised cabbage,and seasonal vegetables (1, 2, 6, 11). GREEN DISH: GREEN DISH: vegetarian patty – hearty and flavorful with root vegetablesand seeds, served with soft potatoes, redcurrant jelly, braised cabbage, andseasonal vegetables (6, 11).

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Tandoori-marinated pork neck fillet, served with steamed rice, spiced tomatosauce, and topped with fresh mango salad (6+13+15). GREEN DISH: Tandoori-marinated tofu, served with steamed rice, spiced tomato sauce, andtopped with fresh mango salad (6+7+13+15).
